mapper.sql: SELECT attachment_id, ticket_id, business_type, business_id, original_name, storage_path, content_type, file_extension, file_size, uploader_id, create_by, create_time, deleted_flag, delete_by, delete_time, storage_deleted_flag, storage_delete_time FROM ticket_attachment
mapper.select: WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND deleted_flag = '0' ORDER BY create_time, attachment_id
WHERE business_type = #{businessType} AND business_id = #{businessId} AND deleted_flag = '0' ORDER BY create_time, attachment_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ticket_attachment WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND deleted_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ticket_attachment (ticket_id, business_type, business_id, original_name, storage_path, content_type, file_extension, file_size, uploader_id, create_by, create_time, deleted_flag, storage_deleted_flag) VALUES (#{ticketId}, #{businessType}, #{businessId}, #{originalName}, #{storagePath}, #{contentType}, #{fileExtension}, #{fileSize}, #{uploaderId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{deletedFlag}, '0')
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_attachment SET deleted_flag = '1', delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = NOW() WHERE attachment_id = #{attachmentId} AND deleted_flag = '0'
UPDATE ticket_attachment SET storage_deleted_flag = '1', storage_delete_time = NOW() WHERE attachment_id = #{attachmentId} AND deleted_flag = '1' AND storage_deleted_flag = '0'
